puzzles.name: Accept Gerald's Case
puzzles.description: Gerald the minotaur needs help finding his stolen labyrinth. Navigate the bureaucracy to officially take on his case.
hints: Maybe you should talk to the anxious-looking minotaur in the waiting room.
Gerald's upset about a stolen labyrinth. Ethel the receptionist might be able to help with the paperwork.
Ask Ethel about Gerald's case file. She'll give you a filing reference card.
Take the filing reference card to the filing cabinet in your office.
Use the case file on Gerald in the waiting room to officially accept his case.
